recommendations.title: ...It's Snowing Outside!
recommendations.overview: After their mother dies, three brothers must live together in order to get their inheritance — and soon start to uncover dark family secrets.

recommendations.title: SMS: Sotto Mentite Spoglie
recommendations.overview: A married man with two children, faithful and in love with his wife,  discovers that his wife would like to spice up the menage a little. He plays along and starts texting her as if he were his lover.

recommendations.title: Three Perfect Daughters
recommendations.overview: Three families go into crisis when their daughters get engaged because they are convinced that their young daughters have all chosen a wrong partner.

recommendations.title: Room
recommendations.overview: Held captive for 7 years in an enclosed space, a woman and her young son finally gain their freedom, allowing the boy to experience the outside world for the first time.

recommendations.title: 10 Rules for Falling in Love
recommendations.overview: Womanizer father teaches clumsy son the decalogue of seduction: ten foolproof rules to make any woman fall in love. But the results will be not what expected.

recommendations.title: Taste Of You
recommendations.overview: It depicts the lives of several groups of characters interacting at the beach of Forte dei Marmi during the mid-1980s.

recommendations.title: ‎7 Hours to Win Your Heart
recommendations.overview: When his girlfriend Giorgia leaves him for his boss, journalist Giulio suddenly finds himself without a woman and with no job. Determined to win back his ex, he attends Valeria's classes, who teaches single men the art of seduction, convinced that re

recommendations.title: Bianca
recommendations.overview: Eccentric and full of manias, Michele is a young high school professor who defines himself as “not used to happiness”. He realizes his life is meaningless if he doesn’t have a woman by his side but, after a series of rather disastrous experiences, he

recommendations.title: Ex
recommendations.overview: Six people struggling with their relationship, or lack thereof, cross paths with their respective exes — and discover they might still harbor feelings for each other.

recommendations.title: Day & Night
